## TRM1.5. Vertical flight efficiency of the climb (PI#8) {#trm1.5.-vertical-flight-efficiency-of-the-climb-pi8 .Heading-2-TZ}

Compared to the overall RP4 average value (34.8 seconds per flight), average times flown level during climb are 14.8 seconds per flight higher in Luxembourg. Luxembourg (ELLX) has an average time flown level of 49.6 seconds per flight during climb.
